ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., 1B, RF, 3B, RP, SP) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., Vet, Arb 3, Rookie) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_position" TEXT /* Position in the draft (e.g., 1st, 2nd, etc.) */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university the player attended */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school the player attended */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Player's dominant hand (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team participates in (e.g., MLB, NBA) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the contract is associated with */,
  "base_salary" REAL /* Base salary of the player */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* Signing bonus received by the player */,
  "incentives" REAL /* Performance-based incentives */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Standard, Minor League, International) */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., Active, Expired, Terminated) */,
  "buyout_clause" TEXT /* Whether the contract has a buyout clause (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "buyout_amount" REAL /* The amount of the buyout clause */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* The guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "performance_clauses" TEXT /* Additional performance-based clauses (e.g., All-Star appearance, World Series win) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contract record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contract record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the salary is associated with */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the salary is based on */,
  "payroll_salary" REAL /* Total payroll salary for the player */,
  "adjusted_salary" REAL /* Adjusted salary after incentives and bonuses */,
  "payroll_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total payroll the player represents */,
  "luxury_tax_salary" REAL /* Luxury tax salary, if applicable */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Total bonus amount (e.g., playoff bonus, championship bonus) */,
  "deferred_payment" TEXT /* Whether the salary includes deferred payments (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "deferred_amount" REAL /* The amount of deferred payment */,
  "tax_deduction" REAL /* Total tax deduction */,
  "net_salary" REAL /* Net salary after tax */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salary record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salary record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the manager is responsible for */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "fired_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was fired (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "total_payroll" REAL /* Total payroll for the team */,
  "total_luxury_tax" REAL /* Total luxury tax for the team */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly, Annual) */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the period */,
  "operating_expenses" REAL /* Total operating expenses for the period */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit for the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the performance is associated with */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the performance is for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "batting_avg" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "hr" INTEGER /* Home runs hit by the player */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* RBIs (Runs Batted In) by the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., Active, Injured) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player (e.g., Healthy, Injured, Suspended) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the player was injured */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date from injury */,
  "performance_grade" TEXT /* Performance grade for the player (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, manager, analyst) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., player, financial) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
